title: Thai Green Curry Chicken (Community Enhanced)
instructions: Heat curry paste in a wok until fragrant.
Pour in coconut milk and simmer.
Stir in Thai basil just before serving.
Squeeze of lime juice at the end for extra brightness.

source_review.text: Amazing curry! I added a dash of fish sauce and squeeze of lime juice at the end for extra brightness. Also threw in some baby corn and bell peppers.

modifications_applied.reasoning: To add extra brightness and flavor to the curry

changes_made.to_text: Squeeze of lime juice at the end for extra brightness.

source_review.text: Used 2% milk instead of coconut milk for a lighter version. Added extra curry paste and topped with crushed peanuts.

modifications_applied.reasoning: User opted for a lighter alternative to coconut milk

enhancement_summary.expected_impact: To add extra brightness and flavor to the curry; User opted for a lighter alternative to coconut milk
